message:
feat(cli): Add auto-update system for @claude-flow packages (ADR-025)

Implements automatic package update checking and installation:

## Features
- Rate-limited startup check (24h default, configurable)
- Automatic patch updates for security-critical packages
- Package compatibility validation before updates
- Rollback capability with history logging
- CLI commands: update check/all/history/rollback/clear-cache

## Architecture
- UpdateChecker: Queries npm registry, compares versions
- RateLimiter: File-based cache in ~/.claude-flow/update-state.json
- PackageValidator: Compatibility matrix validation
- UpdateExecutor: npm install with rollback support

## Configuration
- CLAUDE_FLOW_AUTO_UPDATE=false to disable
- CLAUDE_FLOW_FORCE_UPDATE=true to force check
- Skips automatically in CI environments

## Package Priority
- critical: @claude-flow/security (always auto-update patches)
- high: @claude-flow/cli (auto-update patches)
- normal: @claude-flow/embeddings, integration (notify only)
- low: @claude-flow/testing (notify only)

Published as @claude-flow/cli@3.0.0-alpha.83

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
